responses: Hi! Ask me anything related to fee structure, departments, their HOD names, scholarships of undergraduate programs, admission dates, or hostel fees at CUST.

text: What can you help me with?
What kind of questions can I ask you?
responses: I'm the CUST University Assistant! I can answer questions about admission dates, fee structure by department, scholarships, hostel fees, department heads, and university leadership at Capital University of Science and Technology.

text: When do admissions open at CUST?
When can I apply to CUST?
Last date to apply at CUST?
When does the application period start?
How do I apply to CUST?
What is the application timeline for CUST?
responses: Admissions at CUST for Fall 2025 are open from May to July, with deadlines typically around mid-July. For Spring 2026, applications open in November 2025. Visit www.cust.edu.pk/admissions for exact dates.

text: How much are CUST tuition fees?
What does it cost to study at CUST?
responses: Tuition fees at CUST for Fall 2025 vary by program. For example, BS Computer Science and BS Artificial Intelligence are PKR 292,500 per semester. Check www.cust.edu.pk/fee-structure for details or ask about a specific department.

text: What is the fee for BS Computer Science at CUST?
Cost of a Computer Science degree at CUST?
responses: The tuition fee for BS Computer Science at CUST is PKR 292,500 per semester for Fall 2025, excluding the one-time admission fee of PKR 20,000 and additional charges like library or registration fees. Visit www.cust.edu.pk/fee-structure for details.

text: What is the fee structure for all departments at CUST?
Tuition fees for all CUST departments?
Fee structure for all courses at CUST?
Give me fees for every program at CUST
Can you list the full fee structure?
responses:
The fee structure for undergraduate programs at CUST for Fall 2025 (per semester, excluding one-time admission fee of PKR 20,000) is:
- Computer Science: PKR 292,500
- Software Engineering: PKR 292,500
- Artificial Intelligence: PKR 292,500
- Electrical Engineering: PKR 374,000
- Mechanical Engineering: PKR 374,000
- Civil Engineering: PKR 374,000
- Management Sciences (BBA, BS Accounting & Finance): PKR 250,000
- Pharmacy (Pharm-D): PKR 316,800
- Bioinformatics & Biosciences: PKR 262,000

Additional fees (e.g., library, registration) may apply. Fees are subject to annual revision. Visit www.cust.edu.pk/fee-structure for details.

text: What courses are available at CUST?
What can I study at CUST?
Which degrees can I pursue at CUST?
responses: CUST offers undergraduate programs including Computer Science, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Management Sciences (BBA, Accounting & Finance), Pharm-D, Bioinformatics & Biosciences, Psychology, and English. Ask me about fees or admission dates for any specific program.

text: How do I get to CUST?
What is the CUST campus address?
responses: Capital University of Science and Technology (CUST) is located at Kahuta Road, Zone-V, Islamabad, Pakistan. It's easily accessible from the main expressway.

text: How much is hostel at CUST?
What does student housing cost at CUST?
responses: CUST offers limited hostel facilities. Hostel charges are around PKR 12,000 to 15,000 per month, depending on the room type and facilities. It's best to contact the admin office for availability.

text: How can I get a scholarship at CUST?
Is there merit-based aid at CUST?
responses:
Yes, CUST offers merit-based scholarships, need-based financial aid, and sibling/kinship discounts:
- Board position holder / GPA 3.95 or higher: 100%
- 80%+ marks in FA/FSc or GPA 3.90-4.00: 75%
- Marks in FA/FSc or GPA 3.75-3.89: 50%
- 70%+ marks in FA/FSc or GPA 3.50-3.74: 25%
- 2nd semester onwards, GPA 3.00-3.49: 12.5%
Visit www.cust.edu.pk/fee-structure for more information.

text: Who are the department heads at CUST?

- Mechanical Engineering: Dr. M. Mahabat Khan
- Civil Engineering: Dr. Majid Ali
- Math: Dr. Sagheer Ahmed
- Pharmacy: Dr. Muzaffar Abbas

text: Who is the VC at CUST?
Who currently leads CUST as vice chancellor?
responses: The Vice Chancellor of CUST is Prof. Dr. Muhammad Mansoor Ahmed, PhD (Cambridge, UK), CEng (UK), FIEE (UK), SMIEEE (USA), Eur. Ing (Brussels).

text: Who is the chancellor at CUST?
Who currently serves as chancellor of CUST?
responses: The Chancellor of CUST is Mian Amer Mahmood, HI.
